MIS-About the Program

Management Information Systems, the basis of the information era, is becoming more influential every day as we see how the management of information finds its way into practice and influences multiple branches of science.

People from nearly all sectors are interested in information management systems that increase productivity and want to specialize in their areas. In the last few years, information technology use has also grown in every area of the business world; together with these developments in the world and Turkey, the importance of inter-disciplinary approaches and practices increases daily. The MIS program is designed to address the deficiency of human resources in information management and to educate people who will work in that area.

Today, using computers efficiently is needed in nearly all jobs. Executives of companies, while at the same time preserving past developments, want to see and project the possibilities for the future of their companies. This requires a strong knowledge of computers and the skills to use them. In the MIS program, two of the three emphases of the program are management and computing, and we intend to educate managers who know to compute.

Job Opportunities

Graduates of our MIS program will gain an important advantage in business life, especially in areas such as e-commerce, social media, mobile life, which are constantly developing, with the advanced level (business and technology) management knowledge they have acquired. Since information technologies have an important place in almost all business lines, our graduates’ expertise in information technologies will provide them with additional advantages. Our graduates, who can take part in any management position (business, resource, technology, etc.) in the modern business world using information technologies, especially e-commerce, decision-making systems, software development processes management, data mining, cloud information technologies, system management, business analysis. and project management will meet the needs perfectly.

Our graduates, who can take place in all kinds of management positions (business, resource, technology, etc.) in the modern business world using information technologies, will perfectly meet the needs in areas such as  e-commerce, decision-making systems, software development processes management, data mining, cloud computing technologies, system management, business analysis and project management.

Vision

Our vision is to produce well-rounded business-oriented graduates who can contribute significantly to the management, planning, design, and implementation of information systems. It is committed to playing a significant role in the continuous creation, renewal, and dissemination of knowledge in the discipline of MIS.

Mission

The mission of the MIS Department is to perform and be internationally known for research in the areas of information systems management, knowledge management, systems development methodologies, business computing, databases and information retrieval, and data mining.
